summary: Score adjusted from 92 to 92, as no crawlability issues were found. However, the page has 1 link without descriptive text.

findings.impact: Search engines may have difficulty understanding the content of the page.
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive text to the link to improve accessibility and search engine understanding.

findings.impact: Search engines may have difficulty discovering all pages on the site.
findings.recommendation: Create and submit a sitemap to help search engines discover all pages on the site.

findings.impact: Search engines may not know which version of the page to index.
findings.recommendation: Add a valid rel=canonical link to the page to specify the preferred version.
